name: LM Evaluation Harness (EleutherAI)
pricing_notes: Fully open source (MIT); pay only for API calls if using commercial LLMs

auth.notes: CLI tool; configure LLM provider API key in environment; supports local HuggingFace models

performance.notes: Batch evaluation; throughput depends on hardware for local models; API models limited by provider rate limits

agent_readiness.notes: The standard open-source LLM benchmarking framework. 200+ built-in tasks (MMLU, HellaSwag, ARC, GSM8K, HumanEval, MATH, etc.). Supports HuggingFace models locally, API providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.), vLLM acceleration. Powers Open LLM Leaderboard on HuggingFace. CLI primary interface with Python API. Industry-standard for model capability comparison.

gotchas: CLI-first design; Python API less documented than CLI
Some tasks require downloading large datasets
Not designed for agentic evaluations — static benchmark focus
Result reproduction requires careful version pinning
best_when: Comparing LLM capabilities across standard benchmarks (MMLU, MATH, HumanEval)
Validating fine-tuned models haven't regressed on capabilities
Contributing to HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard
avoid_when: Agentic or multi-turn dialog evaluation (use Inspect AI)
Custom LLM application evaluation (use promptfoo or DeepEval)
summary: EleutherAI's LM Evaluation Harness is the industry-standard LLM benchmarking framework with 200+ built-in tasks (MMLU, HellaSwag, ARC, GSM8K, HumanEval). Supports local HuggingFace models and API providers. Powers the HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard. CLI-first with Python API. Standard for comparing model capabilities and validating fine-tuned model quality. Not designed for agentic evaluations.
